summary: CRITICAL: Actions not pinned to full commit SHAs (security best practice violation). Workflow lacks explicit permissions block. Test extraction function (run-tests.ts lines 85-94) only captures pipe-prefixed lines, breaking JSON/markdown parsing—extractBetweenMarkers won't extract JSON (no pipes) or markdown headers (don't start with |). Production code (validator.ts, formatter.ts, main.ts) is well-structured with good types/error handling (4/5), but workflow security issues and test harness bugs prevent shipping.
